title: the result is incorrect when using window function including multiple sort_spec
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ordertest (str VARCHAR(255), orderA INTEGER, orderB INTEGER, num INTEGER, price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00);

SELECT *,
 SUM(num) OVER(ORDER BY orderA) AS orderbyA,
 SUM(num) OVER(ORDER BY orderA, orderB) AS orderbyAB,
 SUM(num) OVER(ORDER BY orderB, orderA) AS orderbyBA,
 SUM(num) OVER(ORDER BY orderB) AS orderbyB
 FROM ordertest;
key_bug_features: incorrect results with multiple sort specifications in window function
